components.name: Button
components.keyInsight: Monochrome actions with a single decisive emphasis tier.

components.name: Card
components.keyInsight: Quiet surfaces with sharp information hierarchy and minimal ornament.

components.name: Table
components.keyInsight: Data tables should stay dense, readable, and operational rather than decorative.

components.name: Chart
components.keyInsight: Charts reserve the blue scale for insight moments inside an otherwise monochrome UI.

components.name: Navigation
components.keyInsight: Navigation should feel editorial and compact, using contrast shifts instead of bright fills.

components.name: Sidebar
components.keyInsight: Sidebar is a soft contextual frame, not a second accent canvas.

crossComponentPatterns: Use monochrome surfaces with a single dark/light inversion for primary emphasis.
Prefer thin borders and restrained shadows over elevated cards.
Reserve chart blue tokens for data visualization only.
Keep navigation dense, crisp, and text-led.
warnings: Component structures were inferred because the source attachment contained token definitions only.
